name: crop_image
description: Crop an image to a specific region or focal point. Supports face detection, entropy-based smart cropping, and manual focal point coordinates for precise control.

parameters.name: crop
parameters.description: Crop strategy: top, bottom, left, right, faces, entropy, edges, or focalpoint.

parameters.name: fp-x
parameters.description: Focal point X position (0.0 to 1.0). Used with crop=focalpoint.

parameters.name: fp-y
parameters.description: Focal point Y position (0.0 to 1.0). Used with crop=focalpoint.

parameters.name: fp-z
parameters.description: Focal point zoom level (1.0 = no zoom). Used with crop=focalpoint.

body.note: Returns the cropped image binary directly. The image is cropped to 400x400 with face-detection centering.
